name: Petti Di Pollo Ala Florentino (Chicken Floren
recipeIngredient: Parsley sprigs and lemon slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach leaves and blanch in boiling water for 10 seconds. Drain.
2. Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
3. Add spinach to the pan and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes. Remove spinach from the pan and keep warm.
4. Rinse chicken breasts, then pound to 1/2-inch thickness.
5. Heat the same sauté pan over medium heat until a light haze forms from the oil. Add more oil if needed.
6. Stir salt and pepper into flour. Dredge each chicken breast in the flour mixture.
7. Dip chicken in beaten eggs, then fry until cooked through and lightly browned on both sides, about 7 minutes total.
8. While cooking the chicken, make the sauce: Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add flour and cook until dissolved and golden brown, about 3 minutes.
9. Slowly stir in chicken stock and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook until thickened, about 2 minutes.
10. To serve, arrange spinach on each plate. Place a chicken breast on top and spoon sauce over all. Garnish with parsley and lemon slices.
Nutritional info per serving: 544 cal; 63g pro, 19g carb, 23g fat (39%), 3.5g fiber, 276mg chol, 337mg sodium
